summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ACA Compliance Management application covering backend APIs, frontend UI, and integration workflows. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend login, navigation, data entry and calculations work correctly. Minor UI interaction issues found with dropdown selections in actuary registration flow.

ui_bugs.issue: Actuary role dropdown selection has intermittent clicking issues
ui_bugs.details: Dropdown opens correctly but clicking the 'Actuary' option sometimes fails. May be related to timing or overlay issues.

passed_tests: ALE Calculator - Monthly headcount entry and calculation (shows ALE status correctly)
MEC Tracking - Coverage data entry and compliance checking (95% threshold)
Plans management - Health plan creation with all cost-sharing fields
MV Calculator - Minimum Value calculation (68.65% result, meets 60% minimum)
Actuarial Certification - Request creation and tracking
Dashboard - Compliance overview display with all metrics
Sidebar navigation - All navigation links working
Dashboard cards - Clickable navigation to respective pages
Data persistence - All entered data properly saved and retrieved
Real-time calculations - ALE and MV calculations working correctly
Form validation - Proper error handling and validation
Responsive UI - Clean layout and professional design
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI interaction fix needed: The actuary role dropdown selection in the registration form has intermittent clicking issues. This appears to be a timing or overlay issue where the dropdown opens but clicking the 'Actuary' option sometimes fails. All other functionality is working correctly.
